## What

<!-- What do you want to change or add? Be specific. -->

## Why

<!-- How does this improve the autonomous pipeline? What concrete problem does it solve?
     Include evidence if you can: failed generations, error logs, before/after comparisons. -->

## Why not something simpler?

<!-- Is there a lighter-weight way to achieve the same result? If so, explain why your approach is better. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Anything else — screenshots, logs, links to related issues. -->
